positive: A detailed illustration of a mythical celestial guardian, standing confidently amidst swirling cosmic nebulae and stylized crescent moons. The guardian should have flowing, ethereal robes resembling constellations and glowing, segmented armor that looks like crystallized starlight. Focus on strong silhouettes and dynamic composition, with the main subject centered and filling the frame. Use a neo-pop art aesthetic mixed with deep cosmic bioluminescence. Color palette should be dominated by rich indigo, deep violet, sapphire blue, and pops of luminous gold and emerald green. Highly contrasted, vector-art quality, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. Perfect for an apparel graphic, clean lines, symmetrical elements, and high visual impact.
negative: blurry, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, artifact, cluttered, messy, photorealistic, depth of field
